First, for r, I think the formula is r = sqrt(x² + y²). So in this case, x is 0 and y is 3. Plugging those in, r = sqrt(0² + 3²) = sqrt(0 + 9) = sqrt(9) = 3. Okay, so r is 3. That seems straightforward.
